proposed_prompt_improvements: Require the implementor prompt to push at least one substantive commit before invoking Code Review Agent, and include the commit SHA in the review prompt.
For documentation-only issues, instruct the agent to request documentation/process review criteria instead of code-only checks.
Require an explicit acceptance-criteria traceability table artifact mapping each criterion to exact file paths/sections.
If no executable tests exist in the branch, require the agent to record evidence (directory check + command output) and mark test status as not-applicable with rationale.
